attributes.action: Ban all social media platforms for under 16’s
attributes.additional_details: Ban all social media platforms for under 16’s And require photo identification for all accounts  To ensure no children can access them
attributes.background: Ban all social media platforms for under 16’s And require photo identification for all accounts  To ensure no children can access them

rejection.details:
You may wish to sign the following petition, which calls for similar action:

Ban social media for under 16s
https://petition.parliament.uk/petitions/762618
